primitives.name: obj_to_grid
primitives.description: Render object to grid of size h×w

primitives.name: crop
primitives.type: grid → int → int → int → int → grid

primitives.name: fill_rect
primitives.type: grid → int → int → int → int → color → grid

primitives.name: render_objects
primitives.description: Bridge: render list of objects back onto grid-shaped canvas

primitives.name: render_objects_on
primitives.description: Bridge: paint objects onto existing grid (preserves background)

primitives.name: render_object
primitives.description: Bridge: render single object as minimal bounding-box grid

primitives.name: gravity_down
primitives.description: Slide non-background cells downward within each column

primitives.name: gravity_up
primitives.description: Slide non-background cells upward within each column

primitives.name: gravity_left
primitives.description: Slide non-background cells leftward within each row

primitives.name: gravity_right
primitives.description: Slide non-background cells rightward within each row

primitives.name: flood_fill
primitives.description: Replace connected region of target_color with fill_color

primitives.name: fill_interior
primitives.description: Fill enclosed interior zero regions with fill_color

primitives.name: rotate_n
primitives.description: FORMS+NUMBER bridge: rotate grid by n*90 degrees clockwise (n=0,1,2,3)

primitives.name: is_periodic
primitives.description: Check if grid is a periodic tiling

primitives.name: draw_line
primitives.type: grid → int → int → int → int → color → grid

primitives.name: scale_up
primitives.description: Scale grid up by integer factor

primitives.name: scale_down
primitives.description: Scale grid down by integer factor

primitives.name: replace_color
primitives.description: Replace all cells of one color with another

primitives.name: ots_count
primitives.description: OTS: exact count ≤3, returns -1 for >3 (signature limit)

primitives.name: ans_greater
primitives.description: ANS: is n1 detectably greater than n2? (Weber's law)

primitives.name: ans_approx_equal
primitives.description: ANS: are n1 and n2 approximately equal?

primitives.name: succ
primitives.description: Successor function — heart of cardinal-principle bootstrap

primitives.name: render_count_colored
primitives.description: NUMBER+OBJECTS bridge: render count n as 1×n grid of given color

primitives.name: tile_n
primitives.description: NUMBER+OBJECTS bridge: tile grid n times horizontally

primitives.name: count_cells
primitives.description: NUMBER+OBJECTS bridge: count total non-zero cells in grid (not connected components)

primitives.name: count_in_quadrant
primitives.description: NUMBER+PLACES bridge: count objects in given quadrant (0=TL,1=TR,2=BL,3=BR)

primitives.name: trace_path
primitives.description: Draw shortest path from agent color to goal color on grid

primitives.name: move_toward
primitives.description: Move agent one step toward goal (rational efficiency)

primitives.name: move_to_goal
primitives.description: Move agent directly to goal position

primitives.name: infer_goal_dir
primitives.description: Infer likely goal direction from agent position (0=up,1=down,2=left,3=right)

primitives.name: is_rational_path
primitives.description: Check if a path is the shortest (rational efficiency criterion)

primitives.name: project_trajectory
primitives.description: Project agent trajectory in given direction until obstacle

primitives.name: transport_object
primitives.description: Transport cargo object toward goal (AGENTS+OBJECTS cross-system)

primitives.name: get_row
primitives.description: Extract a single row as a 1×W grid

primitives.name: get_col
primitives.description: Extract a single column as an H×1 grid

primitives.name: distance_from_edge
primitives.description: Distance from nearest edge (mod 10) — geometric reorientation cue

primitives.name: distance_from_color
primitives.description: Distance from nearest cell of given color (mod 10) — landmark positioning

primitives.name: segment_by_axes
primitives.description: Segment grid into 4 quadrants by central axes (labels 1-4)

primitives.name: reorient
primitives.description: Canonical reorientation: densest quadrant to top-left

primitives.name: place_in_quadrant_8x8
primitives.description: FORMS+OBJECTS+PLACES bridge: place obj_grid into quadrant of 8×8 canvas

primitives.name: analogy_transfer
primitives.description: Gentner-style analogical transfer: learn transformation from input→output, apply to new_input

primitives.name: grid_to_graph
primitives.description: Convert grid to object graph representation
